welcome.title: Welcome to WrongStack
welcome.subtitle: Connect a provider to get started.
welcome.heroTitle: Where do you want to start?
welcome.heroTitleInProject: Where do you want to start in {{name}}?
welcome.heroSubtitle: The agent is connected to your project and ready to read, edit, run commands, search the codebase, track todos, and remember context across sessions. Pick a starting prompt below, write your own, or type / for the full command palette.
welcome.noKeyBody: Register a provider in Settings before sending a message — otherwise the agent has nothing to talk to. Anthropic, OpenAI, Google, and any OpenAI-compatible endpoint all work.

investigate.title: Investigate
investigate.hint: Debug issues and find root causes
